source_pr.title: privilege/privileges: use pattern match to check dbRecord in mysql.db
source_pr.body:
```
grant all privileges on `te%`.* to 'user'@'host';
```

This will create a record in mysql.db, all databases with name prefix 'te'
(such as 'test', 'temp') will be available to 'user'@'host'

root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a Go data race on global retry knobs used by schema lease checking: the test modified `tidb.SchemaOutOfDateRetryTimes` and `tidb.SchemaOutOfDateRetryInterval` while other code could read them concurrently, triggering race-detector failures. This PR stabilizes it by making these globals atomic (atomic load/store in `schemaLeaseChecker.Check`) and updating the test to use atomic stores when overriding the values.
fix_pattern: Avoid unsynchronized mutation of global variables used across goroutines/tests: use `atomic.Load*/Store*` (or restore via cleanup) for mutable global knobs to prevent data races.
